name: cli
context: You are building a small Node.js CLI calculator in cli.cjs (CommonJS). It is invoked as: node cli.cjs <op> <a> <b>. Read the file first; each step adds one operation and must keep the previous ones working. Parse arguments from process.argv.slice(2) and print the result with console.log.

rungs.title: add
rungs.prompt: Implement op 'add': node cli.cjs add 2 3 prints 5.

rungs.title: sub
rungs.prompt: Add op 'sub': node cli.cjs sub 5 2 prints 3.

rungs.title: mul
rungs.prompt: Add op 'mul': node cli.cjs mul 4 3 prints 12.

rungs.title: div
rungs.prompt: Add op 'div': node cli.cjs div 10 2 prints 5; dividing by zero prints an error and exits with a non-zero code.

rungs.title: help
rungs.prompt: When called with --help or with no arguments, print a line containing the word 'Usage'.
